mentions.note: Trading 11x earnings like Wells Fargo; appears cheap on surface. Cramer demands clarity on fundamentals before enthusiasm; caller Q&A highlight; cheapest stocks in market require validation.
Down 4% for year, trades 12x earnings despite incredible management and execution; clean buy, way too cheap.
Will be solid performer; solid is acceptable, though not as compelling as peers; defensive quality trade.
Barely up; financial sector weakness concerns Cramer.
Fantastic quarter: small beat, 7% revenue growth, 18% EPS growth, NII up 10%; all four business lines beat; CEO bullish on 2026 economy; stock down 4% pure guilt by association.
Consistently good with very few surprises; expect solid growth quarter that will help drive stock higher over time.
